problem.title: Binary Tree Traversal
problem.description:
Implement different traversal methods for a binary tree.
                
Traversal Types:

Preorder: Root → Left → Right
Inorder: Left → Root → Right
Postorder: Left → Right → Root
Level Order: Level by level from top to bottom

example.explanation: Inorder = Left,Root,Right. Preorder = Root,Left,Right. Postorder = Left,Right,Root.

solutions.title: 1. Preorder Traversal (Root → Left → Right)
solutions.description: Visit root first, then left subtree, then right subtree.
solutions.code_python:
# class TreeNode:
#     def __init__(self, val=0):
#         self.val=val; self.left=self.right=None

def preorderTraversal(root) -> list[int]:
    # Recursive
    result = []
    def preorder(node):
        if not node: return
        result.append(node.val)
        preorder(node.left)
        preorder(node.right)
    preorder(root)
    return result

def preorderTraversalIterative(root) -> list[int]:
    # Iterative using stack
    if not root: return []
    result, stack = [], [root]
    while stack:
        node = stack.pop()
        result.append(node.val)
        if node.right: stack.append(node.right)
        if node.left:  stack.append(node.left)
    return result

solutions.title: 2. Inorder Traversal (Left → Root → Right)
solutions.description: Visit left subtree first, then root, then right subtree.
solutions.code_python:
def inorderTraversal(root) -> list[int]:
    # Recursive
    result = []
    def inorder(node):
        if not node: return
        inorder(node.left)
        result.append(node.val)
        inorder(node.right)
    inorder(root)
    return result

def inorderTraversalIterative(root) -> list[int]:
    # Iterative using stack
    result, stack, curr = [], [], root
    while curr or stack:
        while curr:
            stack.append(curr)
            curr = curr.left
        curr = stack.pop()
        result.append(curr.val)
        curr = curr.right
    return result

solutions.title: 3. Postorder Traversal (Left → Right → Root)
solutions.description: Visit left subtree first, then right subtree, then root.

solutions.title: 4. Level Order Traversal (Breadth-First)
solutions.description: Visit nodes level by level from top to bottom.

solutions.title: 5. Morris Traversal (Inorder without Stack/Recursion)
solutions.description: Threaded binary tree traversal using O(1) space.

complexity.space: O(h) for recursive, O(n) for iterative, O(1) for Morris
